calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:46am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Charles Tu, appears in pro per with Patty tu, who will interpret. Respondent Kathy Wai Yin Kwok appears in pro per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and answer questions from Judge Myles.

Respondent returns previously marked exhibits for the Judge's review, and they are retained but not re-marked.
EXHA (1) 15 photos
EXHA (2) 3 receipts

10:29am
Matter is submitted.
